precheck.title: Pre-Check-In
precheck.subtitle: Complete your check-in details before arrival

profile.heading: Your Information
profile.description: Please confirm or update your contact details.

stayDetails.heading: Your Stay
stayDetails.description: Review and update your stay details.
stayDetails.specialRequestsPlaceholder: Let us know if you have any special requests...

policies.heading: Hotel Policies
policies.description: Please review and accept the following policies to continue.
policies.acceptPolicy: I have read and accept the {policy}
policies.dataConsent: I consent to the collection and processing of my personal information in accordance with PIPEDA and Quebec's Law 25.
policies.dataConsentDescription: Your personal data will be used solely for the purpose of your hotel stay and will be handled in compliance with Canadian privacy laws.
policies.marketingOptIn: I would like to receive promotional offers and updates from this hotel.
policies.marketingOptInDescription: You can unsubscribe at any time. This is optional.
policies.allPoliciesRequired: You must accept all required policies to continue.

upsells.heading: Enhance Your Stay
upsells.description: Add special extras to make your stay even better.
upsells.noOffers: No offers are currently available for your stay.

idUpload.heading: ID Verification
idUpload.description: Upload a government-issued photo ID for a faster check-in at the front desk.
idUpload.consentNotice: Your ID will be securely stored and automatically deleted within 24 hours of check-in.
idUpload.consentCheckbox: I consent to the temporary storage of my ID for verification purposes.
idUpload.uploadHint: Accepted formats: JPG, PNG, PDF (max 10 MB)

confirmation.heading: Review & Confirm
confirmation.description: Please review your information before submitting.
confirmation.successMessage: You're all set. We look forward to welcoming you on {date}.
confirmation.successInstructions: When you arrive, just head to the front desk and let them know you've completed your pre-check-in.

errors.invalidTokenMessage: This check-in link is invalid or has expired. Please contact the hotel for a new link.
errors.expiredTokenMessage: Your pre-check-in link has expired. Please contact the hotel for assistance.
errors.networkErrorMessage: We couldn't connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.serverErrorMessage: We're experiencing an issue. Please try again in a few minutes.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
validation.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid phone number
validation.maxLength: Must be no more than {max} characters
validation.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is {max} MB.

accessibility.formError: There are errors in the form. Please review and correct them.
accessibility.fileUploadArea: File upload area. Click or drag a file to upload.
